# praatfan WASM (v0.1.6)

Clean-room Praat-equivalent acoustic analysis for in-browser voice metrics.

- **License:** MIT OR Apache-2.0 (see upstream [praatfan-core-clean](https://github.com/ucpresearch/praatfan-core-clean))
- **Cost:** Free — no API keys, runs entirely on-device
- **Source:** Prebuilt from [GitHub release v0.1.6](https://github.com/ucpresearch/praatfan-core-clean/releases/tag/v0.1.6) (`praatfan-wasm.tar.gz`)

To refresh:

```bash
curl -sSL -o /tmp/praatfan-wasm.tar.gz \
  https://github.com/ucpresearch/praatfan-core-clean/releases/download/v0.1.6/praatfan-wasm.tar.gz
tar -xzf /tmp/praatfan-wasm.tar.gz -C vendor/praatfan-wasm
```
